lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows wear and some staining on the upholstery. The car is currently operational but requires regular maintenance.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs before it can be safely driven. The engine has a significant head gasket leak and a failing alternator, while the transmission struggles to shift into higher gears. Externally, the body shows heavy rust on the wheel wells and several large dents, and the interior suffers from torn seats and a non-functional HVAC system. This is strictly a project car or a candidate for parts.

This is a wonderful opportunity to own a vehicle that has been genuinely well-maintained and remains in good condition! It offers a dependable and smooth driving experience that you'll truly enjoy. While it shows some minor, expected signs of use, its overall care and reliability shine through. It’s ready to hit the road with its next owner today!

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs. The engine runs roughly with a persistent knock, and the transmission experiences significant slipping. There is also noticeable rust on the body and several deep scratches. The interior is heavily worn with tears in the seating. It is currently not in roadworthy condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a complete restoration project.

This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior shows minor cosmetic wear but is free of major damage. The interior is clean and shows normal signs of use. Mechanically, the car is reliable and in good working order.

This vehicle represents the zenith of automotive preservation, presented in an absolute state of excellence. The exterior finish maintains its original showroom luster, complemented by an interior that remains entirely unblemished and factory-fresh. Meticulously maintained and mechanically beyond reproach, this specimen offers a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of uncompromising caliber.

Hey there! I’m so excited to share this absolute gem with you. This car is in pristine, showroom-level condition—honestly, it looks and smells just like it did the day it was first driven home! It’s been pampered and kept in a garage its whole life. You really have to see it to believe how flawless it is. I'm looking for a new home for it where it'll be just as loved. Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offered is an investment-grade E92 M3, featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8. This specimen exhibits flawless mechanical synchronization, with the individual throttle bodies providing instantaneous response and a soaring 8,400 RPM redline. The 6-speed manual transmission delivers tactile engagement, paired with a variable M differential lock for optimal power delivery. Maintenance is exhaustive, including preventative rod bearing replacement and recent VANOS servicing. The chassis remains rigid and uncompromised, with original bushings and suspension components showing zero fatigue. The exterior paint depth is consistent with factory standards, and the interior retains its original matte finish on all touchpoints. This is a true purist's example,
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service history. Original paint. Inspections welcome.

This vehicle is a genuine collector-grade masterpiece, maintained with an obsessive level of care that preserves its showroom-fresh allure. The exterior paint is flawless, boasting a deep, mirror-like clarity free of swirl marks, stone chips, or blemishes, further protected by a high-end ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is a time capsule; the leather bolsters remain firm and uncreased, the original carpets are pristine, and every electronic component—from the infotainment system to the climate control—operates with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach. It has been strictly garage-kept in a climate-controlled environment and has followed a rigorous maintenance schedule performed exclusively by master technicians. The engine bay is detailed to a high standard, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean, reflecting its history of fair-weather use only. Complete with a full set of premium tires, all original keys, and a thick folder of service documentation, this is an uncompromising example for a buyer who demands perfection.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and preserved in showroom condition. This specimen exhibits a flawless exterior profile complemented by an immaculate, wear-free interior, reflecting a history of meticulous stewardship. Engineered for the discerning enthusiast who demands peerless quality, this vehicle undergoes a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure its mechanical integrity is as profound as its aesthetic appeal. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a pre-owned asset that remains indistinguishable from its original delivery state.

We are pleased to present an exemplary specimen that defines automotive excellence. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been preserved to the highest standards of care. The exterior finish maintains its original luster, while the interior remains pristine and devoid of wear. Mechanically, the vehicle operates with the precision and refinement one expects from a factory-fresh machine. This is a definitive acquisition for the discerning client who demands an uncompromised driving experience and a vehicle of investment-grade quality.

Hey there! You've gotta see this absolute gem. It's in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot. I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for something that’s been pampered and is ready for a new home, this is the one for you! Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3, showcasing the pinnacle of naturally aspirated Bavarian engineering. This specimen features the S54 3.2L inline-six, characterized by its individual throttle bodies and high-pressure Double VANOS system, delivering linear power delivery up to an 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis is structurally optimized with documented subframe reinforcement, and the drivetrain retains its tight, factory-spec limited-slip differential. Suspension geometry remains precise, with all bushings and dampers functioning at peak performance. Meticulously maintained with an unblemished finish and a pristine cabin,
Mint condition. Zero defects. Garage kept. Showroom quality. Full service history.

Presenting a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade vehicle in absolute showroom condition. This car has been meticulously preserved in a climate-controlled garage, resulting in a flawless exterior with a deep, mirror-like finish and zero imperfections. The interior is equally stunning, featuring pristine upholstery that still retains its factory-fresh scent, free from any wear, stains, or odors. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a complete, up-to-date service history and a whisper-quiet engine that performs exactly as it did on day one. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the tactile buttons, functions perfectly. This is a turn-key masterpiece for the buyer who demands perfection and a 'new car' experience without the new car price tag.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, preserved in exemplary showroom condition. Every facet of this automobile—from the mirror-finish coachwork to the meticulously curated interior—reflects an uncompromising standard of maintenance and care. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically peerless, this specimen represents the pinnacle of its class, offering an unparalleled acquisition opportunity for the most discerning enthusiast.

This exceptional vehicle is presented in absolute showroom condition, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Meticulously maintained and devoid of any discernible wear, it offers an uncompromising aesthetic and mechanical profile suited for the most discerning collector. We invite you to acquire a specimen that defines the benchmark for excellence in its class.

Hey friends! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, you’d think this beauty just rolled off the showroom floor today—it’s in pristine, mint condition! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it still has that 'new car' magic. It drives incredibly smooth and looks stunning. I'm sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it!
Used car. Condition: mint.
2021 Sedan. Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defies its age, maintained to the highest possible standards. This car has been meticulously garage-kept and remains in showroom condition. The exterior paint retains its deep, factory luster with a professional ceramic coating, appearing entirely free of swirls, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains smoke-free and pristine; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, the bolsters are firm, and every electronic component functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule at certified dealerships. The engine bay is immaculate, the tires are nearly new, and the undercarriage is remarkably clean. This is an investment-grade example for a discerning buyer who seeks a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives as if it just left the showroom floor.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in showroom-grade condition, exhibiting an immaculate exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects a history of meticulous stewardship. Mechanically beyond reproach, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. We invite the discerning buyer to acquire a rare example of preserved excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that defies its pre-owned status. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, boasting a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original showroom luster. Mechanically superior and cosmetically untouched, it offers a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a masterpiece of automotive engineering. Every detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets our exacting criteria for excellence.

Hey there! You have to see this absolute beauty! I've babied this car since day one, and it's still in totally flawless, mint condition—honestly, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It drives like a dream and is ready for its next adventure. If you're looking for something that's been cared for with a lot of love, this is the one for you! Let's get you behind the wheel!
Presenting an investment-grade E92 M3, featuring the legendary S65B40 4.0L naturally aspirated V8. This high-revving masterpiece utilizes individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure Double
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Service records available. Clean title.

Experience automotive perfection with this meticulously maintained masterpiece. This vehicle presents in showroom condition, having been kept in a climate-controlled garage and shielded from the elements since day one. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with absolutely zero imperfections, rock chips, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery still retains its factory scent, the bolsters show no wear, and the carpets are untouched. Every electronic component, sensor, and luxury feature functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history documenting every scheduled maintenance performed exclusively by certified technicians. This is not just a used car; it is a collector-grade example for the discerning buyer who accepts nothing less than the best. Complete with all original keys, manuals, and a custom car cover.

We are proud to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, a specimen that truly epitomizes showroom excellence. Every facet of this automobile, from its flawless exterior finish to its pristine interior appointments, reflects a standard of care that is increasingly rare in the pre-owned market. Mechanically superior and aesthetically peerless, this vehicle offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery. This is an investment-grade opportunity for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.
